<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class ApplicationSid extends TwiML { /** * ApplicationSid constructor. * * @param string $sid Application sid to dial */ public function __construct($sid) { parent::__construct('ApplicationSid', $sid); } }
